title: Parasites: Reloaded
description: You're thrown into a post-nuclear world overrun by parasitic creatures focused on consuming what's left of humanity. The world will push you to your limits as you fight to survive against the relentless onslaught of these horrifying parasites.
body:
# Parasites by Forge Labs and OkRobert ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
In this mod pack, you're thrown into a post-nuclear world overrun by parasitic creatures focused on consuming what's left of humanity. It's a hardcore survival modpack that pushes you to your limits as you fight to survive against the relentless onslaught of these horrifying parasites. Resources are scarce, and every decision counts. You'll scavenge for supplies, manage hunger and thirst, and brave toxic wastelands and radiation zones to stay alive. Crafting and building are crucial for fortifying shelters and defenses against the parasitic threat. Exploration is key to uncovering valuable resources, discovering new crafting recipes, and unraveling the mysteries of the apocalypse. But beware: every corner of this desolate world holds danger, and cooperation with other survivors may be your only chance at survival. Are you ready to face the ultimate challenge and stop the parasites from consuming what's left of humanity?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice For the Shaders / Resource Packs feature you will have to manually install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for 1.12.2 It is recommended that you allocate 6GB of RAM to Minecraft if you intend to use shaders with this modpack
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
